title: Milk Pancake Delight
description: A sweet, flaky breakfast dish featuring milk, suitable for those following a paleo diet and perfect for lazy Sundays.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
In a mixing bowl, whisk together the almond milk and baking powder until combined. Stir in honey or stevia if using, vanilla extract, and coconut oil until fully incorporated.
Pour the batter into the heated skillet. Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve warm with additional sweetener or toppings of your choice.
